# This directory stores the trained CNN model file.
# 
# Expected file: crop_disease_cnn.h5
#
# This file is generated by the training script (Phase 2 of the project).
# It is NOT committed to version control because it can be hundreds of MB.
#
# HOW TO GENERATE THIS FILE:
#   1. Download the PlantVillage dataset.
#   2. Run: python train_model.py
#   3. The script will save the trained model here as crop_disease_cnn.h5
#
# Until this file exists, the Flask service runs in DEMO MODE
# (predictions are based on an untrained model and are not meaningful).
